Items.Title: Manzambi double propels Switzerland to win against Bosnia
Items.Description: Substitute Johan Manzambi scores twice in a thrilling final 20 minutes, as Switzerland beat Bosnia-Herzegovina 4-1 to edge towards a place in the World Cup round of 32.

Items.Title: Who is Johan Manzambi? Everything you need to know about Switzerland's new World Cup hero
Items.Description: Johan Manzambi scored twice in Switzerland's World Cup win over Bosnia and Herzegovina

Items.Title: Switzerland's Manzambi scores superb double against Bosnia
Items.Description: 20-year-old Johan Manzambi scores twice as Switzerland beat Bosnia in their 2026 World Cup match in Los Angeles.
